name: Wheat-Free Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind oats by running Quaker (or similar) quick or regular oatmeal in a blender or food processor.
2. Combine ground oats, sugar, salt, baking soda, and spices in a mixing bowl. Add shortening, eggs, and vanilla extract. Beat until smooth, about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in applesauce and raisins (optional).
4. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
6. Cool; cover pan and store one day before serving.
7. Makes one 8-inch cake.
Taken from "The Quaker Oats Company Wheat, Milk and Egg Free Recipes". These date back to the 1950s.
